source.name: Strat-O-Matic Baseball 365 Rules
source.retrievedNote: 1968-style roster requirements: 25-28 players, 13-17 hitters, 11-14 pitchers, minimum 5 starter-endurance pitchers, minimum 4 pure relievers, minimum 1 closer-endurance pitcher.

definitions.startingEndurancePitcher: Pitcher has a starter endurance rating such as S7.
definitions.pureReliever: Pitcher has a relief endurance rating such as R2 and no starter endurance rating.
definitions.closerEndurancePitcher: Pitcher has a closer endurance rating such as C4.
definitions.primaryCatcher: Hitter has catcher as primary position.
